NoLo Inspiration

NoLo Inspiration – Scan, Discover & Rate No-Alcohol and Low-Alcohol Drinks Curious about no-alcohol and low-alcohol beverages but not sure where to start?

Download Free on the App Store

What NoLo Inspiration does

NoLo Inspiration – Scan, Discover & Rate No-Alcohol and Low-Alcohol Drinks

Curious about no-alcohol and low-alcohol beverages but not sure where to start? NoLo Inspiration is your personal guide to the best NoLo wines, beers, ciders, spirits, and aperitifs — all in one beautifully designed app!

Whether you're cutting back, going alcohol-free, or simply exploring new flavours, NoLo Inspiration makes it easy to discover drinks you'll love, read honest community reviews, and build your own collection of favourites.

Scan a Label, Find a Drink

Standing in a shop wondering if that bottle is any good? Simply snap a photo of the label and let our AI-powered scanner identify the beverage instantly. You'll get the full details, ratings, and reviews in seconds — no more guessing, no more Googling.

Browse By Category

Explore a curated catalogue of NoLo beverages organised into three easy categories: Wine, Beer & Cider, and Spirit & Aperitif. Every listing includes the brand, country of origin, ABV, tasting notes, and an average community rating — so you always know what to expect before you try.

Community Ratings & Reviews

Real opinions from real people. Read ratings and written reviews from the NoLo community to find the drinks worth trying — and share your own experiences to help others discover their next favourite. Every voice counts in building a trusted, independent resource for NoLo drinkers.

Save Your Favourites

Found something you love? Tap the heart to save it to your personal favourites list. Build your own curated collection of go-to NoLo drinks and never forget a great find again. Your favourites are synced to your account so they're always with you.

Powerful Search

Looking for something specific? Search across hundreds of beverages by name, brand, or category. Results appear instantly with images, ratings, and key details so you can find exactly what you're after.

Your Profile, Your Way

Create a free account to unlock favourites, attributed reviews, and a personalised experience. Sign up takes seconds with just an email address — no social media accounts required.

Get in Touch

Have a suggestion for a beverage we should add? Spotted an error? Want to say hello? Our built-in contact form makes it easy to reach the team behind NoLo Inspiration. We read every message.

Why Nolo Inspiration?

The no-alcohol and low-alcohol market is booming, with hundreds of new products launching every year. But finding reliable information about these drinks isn't easy. Most review platforms focus on traditional alcoholic beverages, leaving NoLo drinkers without a dedicated resource.

NoLo Inspiration was built to fill that gap. We believe everyone deserves access to great-tasting drinks — regardless of whether they contain alcohol. Our mission is to create the most comprehensive, community-driven guide to NoLo beverages available anywhere.

Whether you're:

  • Sober-curious and exploring your options
  • A designated driver looking for something better than water
  • Pregnant or breastfeeding and missing your evening glass of wine
  • Training for a sporting event and watching your intake
  • Following a health or wellness journey
  • Simply someone who loves great drinks without the alcohol

…NoLo Inspiration is for you.

Key Features At a Glance

  • AI-powered label scanning to identify drinks instantly
  • Browse wines, beers, ciders, spirits & aperitifs — all alcohol-free or low-alcohol
  • Read and write community ratings and reviews
  • Save favourites to your personal collection
  • Search by name, brand, or category
  • Free to use — no ads, no subscriptions
  • Beautiful, fast, mobile-first design

Download NoLo Inspiration today and start discovering drinks you'll love.

Get NoLo Inspiration for iPhone
